text:
{
  "isSuspicious": true,
  "deviation": "svchost.exe creating registry entries under HKLM\\SOFTWARE\\Microsoft\\Windows\\CurrentVersion\\Internet Settings\\Connections, followed by numerous rapid connections to port 5985 (WinRM). This combination can indicate an attempt to modify network settings for malicious communication or lateral movement.",
  "indicators": [
    "svchost.exe",
    "reg_create",
    "HKLM\\SOFTWARE\\Microsoft\\Windows\\CurrentVersion\\Internet Settings\\Connections",
    "connect",
    "5985",
    "rapid connections"
  ]
}
